tweets.text:
After working with over 250+ VC backed & enterprise B2B SaaS clients...

This 1 pattern keeps surfacing in the teams who are underperforming:

They run outbound off live buying signals instead of static lists.

The static-list model is dying inside every account we audit.

What https://t.co/3s5ygi0uBy

tweets.text:
Your team's LinkedIn likes and comments are a qualified outbound list.

Most teams do nothing with them. 

Here's how anyone can turn content engagement → pipeline:

1. Jungler captures every engagement across your team's posts
2. Engagement data routes to Clay for ICP

tweets.text:
If your form only captures complete submissions, you're leaving 5-6 figures in pipeline per month on the table.

Partial Tally submissions used to disappear for us.

Now they route to Clay and then Slack automatically.

That lead is gone forever unless you have a capture system.
